title: test

steps.text: mettre outils sur le plan de travail

genText:
I. Preparation of Tools  
1. Place tools on the workbench (see photo)  

II. Assembly Procedure  
1. Gather all necessary components for assembly.  
2. Follow the assembly schematic provided in the documentation.  

III. Quality Control  
1. Inspect assembled components for any defects.  
2. Conduct functionality testing according to the standard operating procedures.
